runs.note: Fixed auth.js to support both MD5 and scrypt password hashing during migration. Added scrypt hashing and verification functions, implemented transparent rehashing of MD5 users on successful login, updated password requirements to 10 characters for new registrations and password changes, and ensured existing users with shorter passwords can still log in.
